title: Luffy Pulls the Princess Forward
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Vander Decken, Narrator, Luffy, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The core story beat is luffy pulls the princess forward.
scene: The scene centers on luffy pulls the princess forward, with Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Vander Decken, Narrator, Luffy, Fish-Man Island Citizens driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare you threaten the PRIN- CESS?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry, guys... I don't have anything against you, but...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: wh... whoa... without even breaking free of his ropes...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: This is between me and my beloved Shirahoshi!! Why must you interfere?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was it you who abducted her from the palace?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you the one who's been throwing all that stuff at her?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: That's it!!! I'm taking both of your lives!!! I'll stack you up neatly and slice you into four!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: He just... took out wander decken...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...he's still moving but this is our chance to capture him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He turned into stone for a bit... and now he's drowning in happiness.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Y... yes, of course... b... but please, could you stop speaking so loudly...? It makes me nervous...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: It looks like we're not very popular on this island!!

summary: Luffy Pulls the Princess Forward. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
